---
title: "Workshop 03 — Day 1"
subtitle: "Tidyverse Introduction, Data Cleaning & ggplot2 Basics"
date: 2024-09-01
---

## Schedule

| Time | Topic | Facilitator |
|---|---|---|
| 09:00 - 09:30 | Introduction to the tidyverse | Maria Lopez |
| 09:30 - 10:30 | Data Cleaning and Wrangling | Maria Lopez |
| 10:30 - 10:45 | Break | |
| 10:45 - 12:00 | Visualisation with ggplot2 | John Smith |

## Video Recording

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID >}}

## Slides

[View Slides](slides.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

## R Code

```{.r filename="analysis.R"}
library(tidyverse)

df <- read_csv("arbowatch_data.csv")

# Clean data
df_clean <- df |>
  drop_na(species, count) |>
  filter(count > 0) |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))

glimpse(df_clean)
```

[Download R Script](analysis.R){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

## Reference Document

<iframe src="reference.pdf" width="100%" height="600px" style="border: none;"></iframe>

[Download PDF](reference.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
